auth.title: Welcome back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to the Dar Al-Amirat operations portal.
auth.heroTitle: Run every part of the business from one elegant workspace.
auth.heroSubtitle: Catalog, inventory, orders, financials, and more — unified for the Dar Al-Amirat team.

errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.

modules.comingSoonBody: This module is part of the platform roadmap and will be activated in an upcoming phase. The foundation, navigation, and theming are ready.

overview.title: Overview & BI Analytics
overview.description: Executive dashboards, KPIs, and business intelligence across every channel.

content.title: Content & App Layout
content.description: Compose the storefront and mobile app — banners, sections, and merchandising.

catalog.title: Items & Catalog (B2B)
catalog.description: Manage products, variants, pricing tiers, and wholesale catalog structure.

inventory.title: Inventory & Warehouses
inventory.description: Track stock levels, branches, and warehouse movements in real time.

orders.title: Delivery & OMS
orders.description: Orchestrate orders, fulfilment, and intelligent delivery routing.

seo.title: SEO Engine
seo.description: Optimise visibility — metadata, sitemaps, and search performance.

financials.title: Financials & VAT
financials.description: Reconcile revenue, manage VAT, and stay aligned with ZATCA requirements.

settings.title: Settings & Integrations
settings.description: Configure workspaces, roles, and connections to external systems.

orders.title: Orders & Fulfilment
orders.subtitle: Browse, search, and create orders with automatic pricing and warehouse routing.
orders.searchPlaceholder: Search by order #, customer, or phone

empty.title: No orders found
empty.body: No orders match your filters. Try clearing the search or creating a new order.

detail.title: Order {orderNumber}
detail.splitNote: This order is split across {count} warehouses.

form.title: New order
form.subtitle: Enter a phone number to load the customer, add items, and we'll price and route the order automatically.
form.notFound: No customer with that phone. Create one below.
form.wholesaleBanner: Wholesale pricing active — {tier} tier. MOQ is enforced per line.
form.retailBanner: Retail customer — base pricing applies, no minimum order quantity.
form.itemSearchPlaceholder: Search products by name, brand, or SKU
form.noItems: No items yet. Search and add products above.
form.fixMoq: Resolve MOQ warnings before placing the order.

errors.phoneTaken: A customer with this phone already exists.
errors.moqViolation: Some lines are below their minimum order quantity.
errors.outOfStock: Some items are out of stock at every warehouse.
errors.variantNotFound: One or more products could not be found.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
